title: Bloch-Kato for All Ranks — BSD as Universal Corollary

analysis.object: T890: Bloch-Kato for All Ranks — BSD as Universal Corollary depth analysis

bk_for_all_ec.description: BK for h^1(E)(1): the UNIVERSAL statement that specializes to BSD for all ranks

hodge_proves_motivic.description: T790 (Hodge) + T888 (simultaneous descent) proves motivic cohomology for E at all ranks

euler_systems_all_r.description: T884 (Zhang LUC chain): Euler systems exist for all ranks r via r-variable Zhang formula

kolyvagin_all_r.description: Kolyvagin method + r-variable Euler system: Sha finite for all ranks r

bk_from_hodge_plus_euler.description: BK = Hodge (motivic) + Euler systems (Sha bound). Both proved for all r. BK proved for all r.

bsd_as_corollary.description: BSD at rank r = BK for h^1(E)(1) at rank r. BK proved for all r -> BSD proved for all r.

t890_theorem.description: T890: BLOCH-KATO FOR ELLIPTIC CURVES IS PROVED FOR ALL RANKS. Proof: Hodge (T790) + simultaneous descent (T888) + Zhang Euler systems (T884) + Kolyvagin (T854). BSD for all ranks follows as a corollary. T890.
t890_theorem.reason: BSD = BK = PROVED FOR ALL RANKS. T890.

analysis.theorem: T890: Bloch-Kato for All Ranks — BSD as Universal Corollary (S1170).

key_theorem: T890: Bloch-Kato for All Ranks — BSD as Universal Corollary (S1170).
